card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Mystic Forge
card.text: You may look at the top card of your library any time. You may cast artifact spells and colorless spells from the top of your library. (Face down spells are colorless.) {T}, Pay 1 life: Exile the top card of your library.

card.name: Scrap Trawler
card.text: Whenever this creature dies or another artifact you control is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, return to your hand target artifact card in your graveyard with lesser mana value.

card.name: Scrapyard Recombiner
card.text: Modular 2 (This creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. When it dies, you may put its +1/+1 counters on target artifact creature.) {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Search your library for a Construct card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Triskelavus
card.text: Flying This creature enters with three +1/+1 counters on it. {1}, Remove a +1/+1 counter from this creature: Create a 1/1 colorless Triskelavite artifact creature token with flying. It has "Sacrifice this creature: This creature deals 1 damage to any target."

card.name: Triskelion
card.text: This creature enters with three +1/+1 counters on it. Remove a +1/+1 counter from this creature: It deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Wayfarer's Bauble
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Project Bleeding Edge
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if your opponents lost 10 or more life total this turn, you get {research.png} (a research counter), then if you have ten or more {research.png}, Project Bleeding Edge deals damage to each opponent equal to the amount of life they lost this turn. This ability triggers only once each turn. (Damage causes loss of life.)

card.name: Project Bestiary
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, you get {research.png} (a research counter), then if you have ten or more {research.png}, creatures you control get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the greatest power among creatures you control. This ability triggers only once each turn.
